word: H2154 - זִמָּה - zimmâh - zim-maw' - Heinous crime

sections.paragraph:
Original: זמּה זמּה

Transliteration: zimmâh zammâh

Phonetic: zim-maw'

BDB Definition:

  1. plan, device, wickedness, evil plan, mischievous purpose
    1. plan, purpose
    2. evil device, wickedness
    3. not chaste, incest, licentiousness, adultery, idolatry, harlotry

Origin: from H2161

TWOT entry: 556b

Part(s) of speech: Verb
